scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix engine install && npm --prefix functions install && npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions install
scripts.test: npm --prefix engine test && npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions test && npm --prefix functions test
scripts.build: npm --prefix life-map-pipeline/functions run build && npm --prefix functions run build
scripts.verify:local: npm run build && npm test --if-present && npm run test:launch-readiness --if-present
scripts.verify:production: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:verify
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:root && npm run audit:functions
scripts.deploy:production: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:firebase && npm run deploy:verify
scripts.deploy:partial: npm run verify:local && npm run deploy:hosting-rules && npm run deploy:verify-readonly
